meaning: n.嬉皮,嬉皮模样的年青人
examples: The ankh is an ancient symbol which was adopted by the hippie movement in the 1960s to represent peace and love.
And I've been called a hippie.
They think I'm a bit of a hippie.
Backus, 57, is a former hippie who still has the ponytail to prove it.
Beneath this booming business, however, Whole Foods still hews to its hippie, health-food roots.
